name: Fieldwire Construction Management API
what_it_does: Fieldwire REST API for field management and construction coordination platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve project data, manage tasks and punch lists, access plan and blueprint data, track RFIs and submittals, and integrate Fieldwire construction data into project management and reporting workflows. Fieldwire focuses on field crews and daily construction coordination.
use_cases: Retrieving project tasks and punch list items from construction coordination agents
Tracking RFI status and response data from project management agents
Accessing daily construction progress reports from field operations agents
Integrating Fieldwire task completion data into project management and invoicing agents
not_for: Large enterprise construction ERP (Fieldwire is field-focused, not accounting/finance)
best_when: A construction contractor using Fieldwire wants AI agents to track task completion, surface punch list items, and integrate field data into project reporting workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Construction project data may contain proprietary building plans and client information. Handle per project confidentiality agreements.

auth.notes: Fieldwire API uses API key authentication as Bearer token. API keys are account-scoped and available in Fieldwire account settings.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: up to 5 users, 3 projects
pricing.paid_tiers: Basic, Business, and Business Plus plans scaling users and projects
pricing.notes: Acquired by Hilti in 2021. Competitive construction tech pricing. Free tier for small teams.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Building plans and project data may be proprietary — handle per NDA/confidentiality agreements
No public MCP server — REST API with Bearer token auth
Fieldwire API covers tasks, checklists, and RFIs — not full financial/accounting data
Hilti acquisition may affect API roadmap and pricing — verify current status
File attachments (plans, photos) use separate presigned URL upload flow
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction project and building plan data. SOC2, GDPR. Bearer token auth. EU data residency. Hilti-owned.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction project data. SOC2, GDPR. Bearer token auth. EU data residency.
